title: stylisma pickeringii var. pattersonii
intro: Stylisma pickeringii var. pattersonii, also known as Patterson's Stylisma, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Patterson's Stylisma include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a versatile herb in traditional herbal remedies.
